sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73357" key="o)lu/nqh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλύνθ-η</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73357.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐρινεός</ref> </xr> (the tree), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:20:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.20.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
